metadata.description: Community skills marketplace for Claude Code

plugins.name: genealogy
plugins.description: Parse, explore, and edit GEDCOM (.ged) genealogy files. Use this skill whenever the user mentions a .ged file, GEDCOM data, family trees, ancestry, genealogy research, lineage, ancestors, descendants, pedigree charts, or wants to look up relatives, trace family connections, or correct/update genealogical records.
